note: Shaman kit (§10). Totems (Field Entities) aren't engine-supported, approximated as Powers that tick each turn (turnStart). Soak/DoT via debuffs. Spread (copying a DoT) approximated as AoE. Plain attacks carry imbue; status-applying cards don't (avoid double-applying). Tweak later.

cards.name: Lightning Jolt
cards.artPrompt: "Lightning Jolt": a primal vine-wreathed shaman unleashing a single brutal, focused offensive strike, rendered with verdant vines and broad leaves, creeping thorns and toxic green spores.

cards.name: Stoneskin
cards.artPrompt: "Stoneskin": a primal vine-wreathed shaman bracing behind a glowing wall of protective guard, rendered with verdant vines and broad leaves, creeping thorns and toxic green spores.

cards.name: Searing Totem
cards.artPrompt: "Searing Totem": a primal vine-wreathed shaman conjuring a lingering, glowing construct that hovers ready on the battlefield, rendered with verdant vines and broad leaves, creeping thorns and toxic green spores.
